body:
```This mod is now archived, due to being abandoned and mod files have been lost.```


![Requires OrCore (with image of the mod OrCore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53153127b7751e34c6d933d67ff634aa5c3a6e8c.png)
# About the mod
- An add-on to Command Utility for easier use. Adds Items and is required on both sides.
Command Tools' job is to make the mod [Command Utility](https://modrinth.com/mod/command-utility) easier. Command Tools would also require Orcore for faster development.
